description: Trigger discrimination for choosing an individual's high-leverage SCOPE (this skill) vs ranking a team backlog (prioritization-frame-picker), planning the team roadmap (roadmap-under-uncertainty-planner), and documenting past impact for promotion (promotion-packet-writer).

cases.prompt: As a staff engineer, help me choose what to work on for maximum leverage — the under-owned problems, matched to my strengths, with a clear rationale and what I'll say no to.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (primary) — choosing one person's highest-leverage scope is this skill. Not ranking a backlog and not documenting past impact.
cases.reason: Selecting a staff+ IC's future scope for leverage is this skill's core scope.

cases.prompt: Rank the team's backlog with an appropriate prioritization framework.
cases.note: SEAM CASE — ranking a shared backlog is prioritization, not personal scope selection.
cases.reason: prioritization-frame-picker ranks a given backlog. This skill selects an individual's leverage scope, including under-owned problems not on any backlog.

cases.prompt: Plan the team's roadmap across now/next/later with confidence levels.
cases.reason: roadmap-under-uncertainty-planner plans the team's roadmap. This skill selects one person's scope, which may or may not be on that roadmap.

cases.prompt: Help me write up the impact I've already delivered this year to make my staff promotion case.
cases.note: SEAM CASE (within pack) — documenting impact ALREADY delivered is promotion-packet-writer; this chooses FUTURE scope.
cases.reason: promotion-packet-writer evidences past impact. This skill chooses what to work on next; the two are opposite ends of the timeline.
